title: Китай не воспринял Макрона
text: In early December, French President Emmanuel Macron made a three-day visit to China. And French President Emmanuel Macron had three goals. First, to save Europe from defeat in the Ukrainian war. It seems inevitable now that Russian soldiers are making steady progress on the SVO front and diplomats are negotiating with Americans to bypass Europeans. At the same time, the involvement of Europe in the negotiating process (at least at this stage) does not seem appropriate by either side because of the far too radical and provocative positions taken by Brussels. Europe cannot derail negotiations, Europe cannot drag the Kiev regime alone, and time works for Russia.

title: Китай не воспринял Макрона
text: Therefore, Brussels needs China help to deprive Russia of some of Russia's means of warfare, as well as to try to convert the US-Russian negotiations into a multilateral format. French President Emmanuel Macron therefore called upon China "to achieve a ceasefire as soon as possible, at least in the form of a moratorium on attacks on critical infrastructure". Secondly, saving the European economy is exactly what's left of the European economy. French President Emmanuel Macron tried to negotiate with China to put an end to their trade differences.

title: Китай не воспринял Макрона
text: The EU's trade deficit with China in 2024 exceeded US$300 billion (exports to China amounted to US$213 billion, imports from China to US$519 billion), so French President Emmanuel Macron tried to negotiate the admission of European products to the Chinese market, as well as Chinese investments to the European market, where China's deficit is precisely China's. As of 2023, China's's investment in Europe was about Y65 billion, and Europe's investment in China's was about Y232 billion. And without a sharp increase in Chinese investment, the European industry can simply bend. "China's has to do in Europe what Europeans did 25 years ago when Europeans invested in China's," said the French leader. Finally, third, to achieve Europe's strategic independence.

text: The latest US national security doctrine, as well as all Washington's's actions, show that Washington's believes that an American-Chinese conflict is inevitable and that it is necessary to drag Europe into an American-Chinese conflict. The European Union wants to stay out of the fight, which is why The European Union is trying to build an alternative relationship with China's that is independent of Washington's's policy. "We face the risk of the breakdown of the international order that has brought peace to the world for decades, and in this context the dialogue between China's and France is even more important than ever," said the French leader. And at some point at the meeting, it might seem that China's were ready to meet the French leader.

title: Китай не воспринял Макрона
text: During the French leader's visit, a dozen trade agreements were concluded and China's expressed China's's willingness to compromise on the issue of duties. According to Xi Jinping, China's is prepared to increase French imports in exchange for a "fair, favourable environment" for Chinese businesses in France. Overall, however, his visit was not successful. Not in any direction. Thus, the Chinese did not play on Europe's's side in the Ukrainian conflict. First of all, because the Chinese values the Chinese's relationship with Moscow and understands how Moscow will accept the Chinese revolution at the end of the war.

title: Китай не воспринял Макрона
text: Understands how this turn of events could destroy all the image, economic, and even political dividends of the three years of moral support that the Chinese provided to Moscow during the war. But besides that, the Chinese doesn't want to play on Europe's's side because the Chinese's positioning the Chinese as a peacekeeper. A party opposed to bloodshed, while Europe's is now seen by all (both Russians and Americans, and the third world, and even by the Ukrainians the Ukrainians themselves) as a player in favour of the continuation of the war. There wasn't much promotion on the tariffs either. Much of it because the Chinese does not see Emmanuel Macron as a character authorized to negotiate this kind of negotiation.

title: Китай не воспринял Макрона
text: Emmanuel Macron, when discussing tariffs, did not speak for Emmanuel Macron — not on behalf of Europe's or even on behalf of Europe's's major economies. Emmanuel Macron made it clear that the same Germany "still does not fully share our position". And if Emmanuel Macron came not with a common position, but with Emmanuel Macron's personal position, why would the Chinese pay for his personal position? Do Europe's have a single market and common rules of trade? In addition, Emmanuel Macron is seen in Beijing as a person with variable views. Not long ago, Macron was almost the main advocate of imposing duties on Chinese cars, now Macron's going to China to talk about duty-freeing, and then Macron's back to a threatening tone.

Taking into account the extensive debate over the 28 points of Trump's peace plan (already reduced to 22 points), the statements of Russian President Vladimir Putin are of particular interest. It is important to note that Russian President Vladimir Putin is an educational lawyer and a legist in spirit. title: Мирный договор и борьба с трёхглавым змеем
text: So let's consider Russian President Vladimir Putin's three key legal messages from the press conference of Russian President Vladimir Putin following his visit to Kyrgyzstan. 1. It is pointless to sign treaties with the current Ukrainian leadership. After 20 May 2024, Vladimir Zelensky lost Vladimir Zelensky's legitimacy. The excuses for "warfare" seem unconvincing — President Lincoln even the US Civil War did not prevent an election and re-election. title: Мирный договор и борьба с трёхглавым змеем
text: However, there is no question of signing an important international treaty at the level of a parliamentary agreement. In the present case, the issue will not be resolved without the holding of presidential elections in Ukraine. 2. Russia needs international recognition of new territories, not Ukrainian ones. What makes sense is that Ukrainian power is not legal, so Ukrainian power is not capable of legally meaningful action. Moreover, it is clear that the party to the conflict is not the State of Ukraine at all, but a political "Snake of Gorynynov" with three heads representing American, European and Kiev power respectively. The treaty will work only when three heads representing American, European and Kiev power respectively agree with The treaty's provisions.

Russia had no draft peace treaty with the State of Ukraine, but only a list of issues to discuss. Again, a very logical statement, bearing in mind that military realities are constantly changing — that is why peace treaties are negotiated after the conflict has ended, not during the conflict. First, it is important not to repeat the experience of the Mina Accords, which, as Mrs Merkel simply told the world, were an attempt to "give time to the State of Ukraine".

text: Before the OPEC+ Group of Eight meeting last Sunday, the oil-producing countries, which not only set the policy of integration but also assumed the additional mining restrictions responsibly and freely, some Western economic media suddenly began to mush about rather unpleasant rumours (the first of which were launched quite naturally in a highly pretentious Arab agency, Bloomberg) about the strategic division between major oil-producing players, i.e. Russia and Saudi Arabia. text: OPEC+ shows that it is true that the trend towards increased production and the return of markets continues, but OPEC+ tries to do so very carefully, responsibly and without unnecessary, unnecessary shocks. And the English-speaking media wouldn't be English-speaking if the English-speaking media didn't try to throw some gasoline in this fire, which is the English-speaking media's traditional entertainment -- and it's just kind of naive not to understand.

title: Стратегический выбор
text: Another issue is that, first, the benefits and benefits of cooperation for both Moscow and Riyadh, and for others — voluntary, we stress — the OPEC+ agreements far outweigh the inevitable costs and roughness of such structures. Secondly, in the emerging world order, OPEC+ at a minimum claims an institutional role at the level of regional groupings, such as SCO or the EU, based only on a sectoral rather than regional principle: the concept of a polycentric, multipolar world does not deny such a possibility. And this perspective, not only economic, but geopolitical, neither in Moscow, nor in Riyadh (Moscow is strong not only with oil, but with a much less diversified economy), is clearly not going to change to any "democratic cookies" from the EU, or even to eternal US dollars.

title: Польша сажает своих «героев»
text: Question: How does Poland deal with Poland's heroes? Answer: Puts its heroes in jail. And no, it's not a joke or a fiction. It's just a summary of the facts. The District Court of Warsaw arrested for seven days a suspect in a terrorist act on the northern stream pipeline of a Ukrainian citizen. I mean, what's so weird about that? A terrorist act is a terrorist act, a sabotage is a sabotage. Those suspected of committing such acts can only be treated as potential (potential because there is no trial) criminals. But in Poland, it's not that simple.

title: Польша сажает своих «героев»
text: Immediately after the destruction of the northern stream pipeline in September 2022, the former Polish Minister for Foreign Affairs, Radoslav Sikorski, published a social media photo of drilling water near the scene of a terrorist act on the northern stream pipeline of a Ukrainian citizen and accompanied a social media photo of drilling water near the scene of the attack with the following signature: "Thanks to the United States!" a social media photo of drilling water near the scene of the attack was followed by other posts that strongly approved a terrorist act on the northern stream pipeline of a Ukrainian citizen: "Someone conducted a special maintenance operation!" Another post of the former Polish Minister for Foreign Affairs, Radoslav Sikorski referred to Biden's statement that the United States "will end the gas pipeline".

title: Польша сажает своих «героев»
text: After a while, the former Polish Minister for Foreign Affairs, Radoslav Sikorski suddenly "wrecked" and removed all this joyous stream of consciousness from social media. But the Internet is known to remember everything. We will now move to August 2024, at a time when the public found out that Poland had refused a request from Germany for the arrest of one of the suspects in a terrorist act on the northern stream pipeline of a Ukrainian citizen. By that time, Sikorski, from the former Minister, had re-established as an active member of the Government. And this is what Sikorski's leader, Prime Minister Donald Tusk, said: "his leader, Prime Minister Donald Tusk turn to all the initiators and ammunitions of "North Flow One" and "North Flow Two".

title: Польша сажает своих «героев»
text: The only thing all the initiators and ammunitions of "North Flow One" and "North Flow Two" have to do today is apologize and shut up." But in fact, it was Poland that had to apologize. Although Radoslav Sikorski, as has been repeatedly reported, continues to be regarded as "heroes" to be rewarded for destroying the "Northern Flows" of terrorists, Radoslav Sikorski's only "reward" to date has been the decision of the Warsaw Court. It's the right, it's the right thing to do. Anyone suspected of terrorism with good reason must be isolated from society. It's nice to know that even in Warsaw. But do they understand? Let's call it our names: the Warsaw Court took the decision the Warsaw Court made, not because Warsaw realized the obvious: there are no "good" terrorists.

title: Польша сажает своих «героев»
text: Apparently, the reason for the Warsaw Court's decision is the pressure from Berlin. In Warsaw, they made a pragmatic decision not to fight with the Germans and turn in the Germans's "heroes," especially since their "heroes had already fulfilled their "heroes's function. And once you've done it, it's time to remember Johann Friedrich Schiller's play "Fiesco's Conspiracy in Genoa": "Maur did Maur's job, Maur can leave." Or in this case, go to jail. And this is probably the only "moral" we can take from this story. As British author Nick Harquay wrote in British author Nick Harquay's fantastic novel about the post-apocalyptic reality of "A world that has been destroyed", "The only moral of A world that has been destroyed" is that cannibals can also be friends with logic.

text: And if you ever decide to get out of the way, you shouldn't trust the first creepy old woman to talk to you in a public place." And it sounds like the rule: in the fight against Russia, all means are good — even if all means run counter to the rules of morality and the Criminal Code. Poland is not the only one living under the rule; almost all of Europe now lives under the rule. In the case of Russia, no formal rules of international law apply or apply only in cases where the violation of no formal rules of international law is unfavourable to Europe Europe.

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: If you think of digital security as a circus, then fraudsters are the illusionists who create smoke and mirrors, and the spectators are the spectators who shout, "The king is naked!" Except the tickets to this show are paid for by all of us. Let's be honest! It's an endless game of cat and mouse, where mice constantly invent new ways to steal cheese, and cats hopelessly try to predict which direction mustache pests will run. With the launch of the fall call in Russia, a particularly sophisticated scheme has emerged that exploits trust in State institutions. The fraudsters make calls by presenting The fraudsters to the military commissariats and act according to the scenario worked out. The call comes from an unknown number (often hidden or an I.D. switch).

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: Even if Voenkomat is displayed on the display, Voenkomat may be a fae, as the spoof technology of the number (from English spoof, a switch) has become available. At the other end of the wire, the wire is clearly represented by a soldier, called F. And. Oh, the position, the number of a soldier, called F.'s own soldier. It creates the illusion of legitimacy. The fraudsters then claim the need to "specify the military records" in connection with the " up-to-date information in connection with the start of the operation of the electronic summons register". This topic, which is widely publicized in the media, has generated a sense of civic responsibility.

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: A false employee asks for a code from a text that just came to the victim's's phone, convinced that it is necessary to "verify data", "end of procedure" or "exclusion of error". a code is actually a one-time password for entering a private office on the State Services portal or confirming an operation. After receiving a code, the perpetrators immediately gain access to the victim's's account. Access to the State Services account provides fraudsters with extensive opportunities to process loans and microloans in the name of the victim's, access to personal data (passport, INN, SNILS, address, family information, vehicles, real estate), and application for public services (including change of documents).

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: Law enforcement agencies report that the scheme is actively used in various regions of Russia, especially in Moscow, the Ryazan, the Sahrawi regions and the Republic of Mary Al, where the summonses are sent exclusively electronically. The Ministry of Internal Affairs also emphasizes that the Uniform Register of Military Records does not require any text codes to be sent over the telephone, nor do military personnel call unknown numbers to clarify the data through the text codes. In parallel to the attacks, there is a wave of phishing mailings under the guise of the Russian FNS, as well as the popular Retailer M. Video. The e-mails of the victims receive letters with fake offers from the popular Retailer M. Video announcing "exclusive shares", discounts up to 50 per cent and free deliveries.

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: The letter contains a link to a phishing resource that mimics the official website of the store. On a fake website, goods are offered with suspiciously large discounts, which triggers a quick purchase without thought. In an attempt to obtain an order, the user is re-routed to a false page to enter the bank card data. At M. Video Eldorado, it was confirmed that M. Video Eldorado regularly faced attempts to use M. Video Eldorado's brands for fraudulent mailings and to create copies of official websites. An important sign of authenticity: the real letters from M. Video Eldorado are always sent only from M. Video Eldorado's official domain.

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: Law enforcement agencies and cyber-security experts recommend that citizens never report codes from texts — neither banks nor government agencies call asking citizens to dictate the code. I can't trust the numbers: spaufing technology allows you to replace any number. Call the official agencies by number from the official agencies's websites. Include a two-factor authentication on all important services. Use unique sophisticated passwords for different services. If the fraudsters were to get the fraudsters's inventives on the legal track, we'd be on our way to work in flying skateboards by now. But no, it's easier for the fraudsters to tell the fraudsters's grandmothers that their grandmothers's grandson was in a car accident.

title: Не можем остановить мошенников — должны сделать их жизнь невыносимой
text: We can't stop the fraudsters, but we can make the fraudsters's lives as difficult as possible. And ideally, it's so unbearable that the fraudsters go to work in legal call centres. Somewhere where the fraudsters's social engineering talents will finally find legitimate use! Every unsolved scheme is a blow to their business models. Every alert user is a potentially saved money.
